## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Security hardening

## Validation

- [ ] Backend tests pass (`python -m unittest discover -s tests`)
- [ ] Frontend build passes (`npm run build` in `frontend/`)
- [ ] Manual smoke check completed

## Security checklist

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or private endpoints added
- [ ] New config values documented in `.env.example` (if applicable)

## Screenshots / Logs (if applicable)

Add screenshots for UI changes or logs for backend behavior changes.

## Related issues

Link issues (e.g. `Closes #123`).
